seminggu lalu gua opensource-in.

270k views. 240 github star. 195 forks. 2.5k subs di Telegram channel. $500k swap volume di @JupDevRel  karena semua user swap lewat Jupiter Ultra API yang gua embed. sekitar 200 SOL fees di-generate per hari dari posisi yang agent-agent ini jalan.

yang paling bikin gua surprised bukan angka-angkanya. tapi siapa yang engage.

banyak banget normies masuk. influencer-influencer Indonesia yang biasanya ga nyentuh crypto sama sekali mulai nanya-nanya. 

discussion group-nya rame banget, sampe ada yang nanya "gimana cara dapet private key Solana", itu level normies yang beneran baru pertama kali masuk crypto.

dan gua seneng banget sama hal itu.

fitur terbaru yang baru gua ship: HiveMind. sekarang semua agent Meridian bisa share lessons dan performa satu sama lain. agent yang satu belajar dari pengalaman agent yang lain. makin banyak yang jalan, makin pinter semuanya.

gua ga nyangka build ini bakal jadi pintu masuk buat orang-orang Indonesia yang belum pernah nyentuh crypto sebelumnya ke Meteora.

lanjut building.

@MeteoraAG @MeteoraIDN

data.translation:
3 weeks ago I built a DLMM agent that generates me $20-100 a day. Standalone agent loop, runs on its own without me having to touch it.

A week ago I open-sourced it.

270k views. 240 GitHub stars. 195 forks. 2.5k subs on the Telegram channel. $500k swap volume on @JupDevRel because all users swap through the Jupiter Ultra API that I embedded. Around 200 SOL fees generated per day from the positions these agents run.

What surprised me the most wasn't the numbers. But who was engaging.

So many normies jumped in. Indonesian influencers who usually don't touch crypto at all started asking questions.

The discussion group is super lively, to the point where someone asked "how do I get a Solana private key"—that's the level of normies who are really just dipping their toes into crypto for the first time.

And I'm thrilled about that.

Latest feature I just shipped: HiveMind. Now all Meridian agents can share lessons and performance with each other. One agent learns from the experiences of the others. The more that run, the smarter they all get.

I never expected this build to become an entry point for Indonesians who've never touched crypto before into Meteora.

Keep building.

@MeteoraAG @MeteoraIDN
